description: Remote signature add-ons for C0defusi0n SecurityScanner. These patterns are MERGED ON TOP of the module's built-in baseline — put only NEW/extra detections here. Each 'regex' is a full PCRE pattern with delimiters and flags; invalid patterns are skipped by the module.

patterns.description: Base64-decoded payload piped into fetch() — common Magecart exfiltration shape
assert()-based PHP webshell using base64-encoded code
Checkout/login form posting to an external host (credential or card theft)
Detects common markers for the WSO (Web Shell by oRb) webshell, a popular PHP backdoor.
Detects common markers for the c99 webshell, a feature-rich PHP backdoor.
Detects a known PHP code execution probe uploaded via the Amasty Order Attributes arbitrary file upload vulnerability (CVE-2026-53787).
Detects generic PolyShell polyglot files (GIF header + PHP code) used for arbitrary file uploads and potential RCE.

Detects serialized PHP objects related to the Mirasvit Cache Warmer vulnerability, indicating potential object injection exploitation. This pattern would be found if the serialized payload is stored in a file or database entry.
Detects suspicious Magento layout XML injection referencing a potentially malicious PHTML template, a known persistence mechanism for backdoors and skimmers.
Detects JavaScript skimmer code attempting to base64-encode JSON containing common credit card details, a technique used for obfuscated data exfiltration.
Detects modification in 'vendor/magento/framework/View/Element/Template/File/Validator.php' to bypass template file validation, allowing malicious templates to be loaded.
Detects Magento JavaScript skimmers that use 'wrapper.wrap' to override core functions and inject 'atob'-decoded malicious code.
Detects PHP code attempting to create a new Magento admin user, a common backdoor for persistence.
Detects JavaScript skimmers that override 'XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open' or 'send' to intercept network requests, a common technique for data exfiltration.
